dialogueChunks.intro: You've done it. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_has} been found, shaken but alive. The {quest_threat} is broken, at least for now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement is overjoyed. {quest_ally} has been tending to the rescued and says they'll recover in time. What you did out there took real courage, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.outro: You've earned more than gratitude. This settlement will remember what you did when the {quest_stakes} hung in the balance.

dialogueChunks.intro: You found the place, but the {quest_focus} was already moved on. The camp was abandoned in haste. Still, you've shattered the {quest_threat}'s hold on this region.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It's not the ending we wanted, but the {enemy_type} lost fighters, supplies, and their element of surprise. {quest_ally} says the intelligence you recovered will help prevent this from happening again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes a partial victory is all we get. You did everything you could for the {quest_stakes}, and that matters.

dialogueChunks.intro: Not only did you free the {quest_focus}, you turned the captors' own camp against them. The {enemy_type} scattered when they realized they'd lost everything.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} can hardly believe the report. The supplies you seized from the {quest_threat} will sustain us for weeks. The prisoners you freed are spreading word of what you did.
dialogueChunks.outro: You didn't just solve a problem: you sent a message. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} secure, and the {enemy_type} will think twice before crossing this settlement again.
